title: Erythrobalanus tolimensis
taxonomy: Erythrobalanus tolimensis belongs to the family Erythroxylaceae. This family is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the coca family. Erythrobalanus tolimensis is a type of flowering plant native to Colombia. It is closely related to the Erythroxylum genus, which includes other species of coca plants. Further classification of Erythrobalanus tolimensis may involve its classification as a species within the Erythroxylum genus.
